# preprocessing.split.split_abs_train_val_test { #spotforecast2_safe.preprocessing.split.split_abs_train_val_test }

```python
preprocessing.split.split_abs_train_val_test(
    data,
    end_train,
    end_validation,
    verbose=False,
)
```

Splits a time series DataFrame into training, validation, and test sets based on absolute timestamps.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name           | Type                                           | Description                                | Default    |
|----------------|------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------|------------|
| data           | [pd](`pandas`).[DataFrame](`pandas.DataFrame`) | The time series data with a DateTimeIndex. | _required_ |
| end_train      | [pd](`pandas`).[Timestamp](`pandas.Timestamp`) | The end date for the training set.         | _required_ |
| end_validation | [pd](`pandas`).[Timestamp](`pandas.Timestamp`) | The end date for the validation set.       | _required_ |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                                                                                                                                                               | Description                                                                                                                                                 |
|--------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| tuple  | [tuple](`tuple`)\[[pd](`pandas`).[DataFrame](`pandas.DataFrame`), [pd](`pandas`).[DataFrame](`pandas.DataFrame`), [pd](`pandas`).[DataFrame](`pandas.DataFrame`)\] | A tuple containing: - data_train (pd.DataFrame): The training set. - data_val (pd.DataFrame): The validation set. - data_test (pd.DataFrame): The test set. |

## Examples {.doc-section .doc-section-examples}

```python
>>> from spotforecast2_safe.data.fetch_data import fetch_data
>>> from spotforecast2_safe.preprocessing.split import split_train_val_test
>>> data = fetch_data()
>>> end_train = pd.Timestamp('2020-12-31 23:00:00')
>>> end_validation = pd.Timestamp('2021-06-30 23:00:00')
>>> data_train, data_val, data_test = split_train_val_test(
...     data,
...     end_train=end_train,
...     end_validation=end_validation,
...     verbose=True
... )
```
